roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:3056PTR/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/CJ:42D/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 17 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 10-03-13/X:DEFT MUST COMPLETE 71 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360, HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT, ABED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, 11-07-13, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360, ADULT PROBATION HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TEATMNT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO DETOXFACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 71 DAYS OF TREATMENT,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED AS OF:10-20-13/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE ANDCOMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
